scope.summary: Verify the existing semantic query_text capability probe returns the documented typed requires_23ai refusal before the generic read resolver can classify server-owned VECTOR_EMBEDDING SQL.
out_of_scope: Changing query_vector semantics or Oracle server capability requirements.
Claiming a live XE18, XE21, or FREE23 matrix run without the required lane credentials.

entry_points.name: oracle_semantic_search query_text
entry_points.trace: semantic_search_as_query_args calls semantic_search_text_model before the constructed query enters DEFAULT_CLASSIFIER; the pre-23.4 probe returns RuntimeStateRequired with structured_reason.offending_construct=requires_23ai. The registry documents that exact token, and the served version-matrix ladder asserts it on XE18/XE21 while accepting no_in_db_model on FREE23.

limitations: Scoped test only: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp semantic_text_search_requires_both_capabilities_before_a_read_can_escape -- --nocapture (1 passed). The test proves a 23.4-compatible profile with one model reaches the generated read, then a 21.0-compatible profile returns requires_23ai before another caller-visible read.

The local xe18, xe21, and free23 containers were running, but this session had no ORACLEMCP_LIVE_XE or ORACLE_MATRIX_* lane credentials, so scripts/e2e/oracle_version_matrix.sh was not run. The full workspace gate was not run for this close.
